result.stdout:
Description:
  A cli tool project helps recording happy times and reactions.

Usage:
  happy-recorder [command] [options]

Options:
  -d, --dry-run   Preview changes without actually making them
  -v, --verbose   Show detailed log
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  get     Database result fetcher.
  mark    Add a new happy record to the database.
  config  Configuration management.

commands.payload:
Description:

  --version       Show version information

Commands:

  mark    Add a new happy record to the database.
  config  Configuration management.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Configuration management.

Usage:
  happy-recorder config [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  -d, --dry-run   Preview changes without actually making them
  -v, --verbose   Show detailed log

Commands:
  get-db-location  Get current program's database file location.
  set-db-location  Set current program's database file location.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Set current program's database file location.

Usage:
  happy-recorder config set-db-location [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path> (REQUIRED)  Path of the videos to be parsed.
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information
  -d, --dry-run                 Preview changes without actually making them
  -v, --verbose                 Show detailed log

result.stdout:
Description:
  Database result fetcher.

Usage:
  happy-recorder get [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  -d, --dry-run   Preview changes without actually making them
  -v, --verbose   Show detailed log

Commands:
  score          Show current happiness score.
  history        Show happy history.
  calendar       Show score calendar.
  feel, feeling  Show current feeling.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Add a new happy record to the database.

Usage:
  happy-recorder mark [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  -d, --dry-run   Preview changes without actually making them
  -v, --verbose   Show detailed log

Commands:
  now   Mark current time as happy time.
  time  Mark specific time as happy time.
  ago   Mark past time as happy.

commands.payload:
Description:
  Add a new happy record to the database.

Usage:
  happy-recorder mark [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  -d, --dry-run   Preview changes without actually making them
  -v, --verbose   Show detailed log

Commands:
  now   Mark current time as happy time.
  time  Mark specific time as happy time.
  ago   Mark past time as happy.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Mark past time as happy.

Usage:
  happy-recorder mark ago [options]

Options:
  -m, --minutes <minutes> (REQUIRED)  How many minutes ago to be marked as happy.
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information
  -d, --dry-run                       Preview changes without actually making them
  -v, --verbose                       Show detailed log

result.stdout:
Description:
  Mark specific time as happy time.

Usage:
  happy-recorder mark time [options]

Options:
  -t, --time <time> (REQUIRED)  Time string about when you triggered.
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information
  -d, --dry-run                 Preview changes without actually making them
  -v, --verbose                 Show detailed log
